title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 26 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 26 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 26 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures market roseing sharply trends. the main contract closed 826，an increase of 3.38% throughout the day;some traders were active to sell, and Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand. Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable .
